params.context: Qianwen iter 7 — HTTP-layer signal axis. Iter6 proved frontend native timeout 系统超时 fires regardless of SSE envelope content. Hypothesis: response Content-Type / streaming format itself triggers timeout — try dropping SSE entirely. envelope_template now: HTTP/1.1 200 + Content-Type: application/json (no event-stream) + Connection: close + X-Response-Complete: 1 header + block-style single JSON {success, requestId, data:{choices:[{message,finish_reason,index}],model,id,object,created}}. No event: lines. Backup: pre_iter_chatglm12_qianwen7_genspark8_20260518_085011.sql. DB id=39.
